bio.content: My name is Jonas Fjærestad. I am an animator, developer and otherwise quite a nice guy. I have a bachelor's degree in animation from the University Inland Norway where I specialized in environment art and general 3D production. For the final year me and and the group I was a part of  got together and created what I would consider a video game.
bio.content02: In newer times I even managed to get a second Bachelor's degree in information technology at OsloMet where I acquired some knowledge in development and programming. For the last semester I had the privilege and pleasure of going abroad to Den Bosch in the Netherlands. There I do part in an exciting multidisciplinary project in the Emerging Technologies Playground program.
bio.content03: These days you can also find me at my sole proprietorship where I do everything from animation to web development.
